text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 304 

RELATIONSHIP_CODE 

LABEL: Relationship Code 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the code that identifies whether the contract and plan ID that was active in in the 
reference year was new or related to a contract and plan ID in the previous year. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: N = New 
R = Renewal 
C = Consolidation 
T = Termination
